name: visualize_deck_state
description: Parse an OT-2 simulation log and produce four visualisation artefacts saved under output/<run_id>/: a multi-page PDF report, an interactive Plotly HTML dashboard with animation, a GIF deck animation, and a statistics dashboard PNG.

inputs.name: run_id
inputs.description: Optional identifier for the output subdirectory. Auto-generated from timestamp if omitted.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON string with protocol_name, steps_parsed, snapshots count, outputs (paths to pdf/html/gif/stats_png), and any per-format errors.
